description: All-in-One AI CLI Hub: one hotkey to launch, switch and manage Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Kiro, Kilo Code, OpenCode, Grok, Antigravity or any custom coding agent — side by side in your IDE. Write better prompts with @-file mentions, images, auto-translation and voice. Install agent Skills, track usage, and prime every CLI with your project's memory so it starts already knowing your codebase.
